title: Chef Aid 2 Flexible Skewers - Extra-Long And Flexible Stainless Steel Skewers, 72cm Long, flex to fit space on the BBQ. Durable And Sturdy. Easy To Clean, Perfect For Any BBQ Set Or Kitchen Collection
features: DOMINATE THE GRILL - The Chef Aid Flexible Skewers are the ultimate tool for any grilling task. Effortlessly pierce meat, vegetables, and other ingredients with these extra-long skewers. These skewers are flexible and will fit any BBQ.

EXTRA LONG AND FLEXIBLE - Made from stainless steel, our skewers measure 72cm in length and are flexible for cooking on the barbecue. They fit double the amount of normal skewers, making the most of space on the BBQ
DURABLE AND STURDY - Our skewers are made from high-quality stainless steel, ensuring that they are durable and will last for many barbecues to come
VERSATILE AND MULTI-PURPOSE - Our skewers are perfect for grilling meat, vegetables, and other ingredients on the barbecue. They are versatile and can be used for a variety of dishes
EASY TO CLEAN - With their smooth surface and high-quality material, our skewers are easy to clean and won't retain any food or grease
description: From the manufacturer About Us Chef Aid is our most affordable brand and offers an extensive range of products for the kitchen and home. Chef Aid is based on saving you money without compromising on quality.
